_comment: Layer 3 subagent FAN-OUT verify. orchestration='subagent-fanout' makes ONE lead agent delegate each sub-question to an ISOLATED sub-agent (sessions_spawn -> sessions_yield) so raw web pages stay in the child context and only a distilled summary returns to the lead — the STRUCTURAL bounded-context fix (vs Layer-1 pruning which trims in place). The 'steps' are the sub-question topics the lead fans out; the lead wraps them with the sessions_spawn/yield instructions. Use with configs/lfm2_ollama_research.json on a T4. Probe confirmed sessions_spawn/subagents are in the --local agent catalog.
steps: the current latest stable version of Python (from python.org)
the current latest LTS version of Node.js (from nodejs.org)
the current latest stable version of Go (from go.dev)
